tasks.title: Add per-request cache field
tasks.description: private array $cachedInheritFromPublic = []; on PermissionHandler.php, keyed by schema ID.

tasks.title: Implement cascade resolver
tasks.description: Public method resolveInheritFromPublic(Schema): bool. Cascade: schema → register → IAppConfig openregister.rbac.inherit_from_public_default → true. null = unset.

tasks.title: Wire IAppConfig dependency
tasks.description: Reuse existing injection; add to constructor if not present.

tasks.title: Cache resolved value per request
tasks.description: Implicit reset on PHP process boundary.

tasks.title: Unit-test cascade resolution
tasks.description: Four levels: schema set / register set / tenant set / all unset → true. Plus null = unset semantics.

tasks.title: Wrap inheritance fallback in flag check
tasks.description: PermissionHandler::hasPermission lines 229-241; gate hasGroupPermission(public,...) on resolveInheritFromPublic === true.

tasks.title: Confirm anonymous-user behaviour unchanged
tasks.description: Lines 174-184 if ($user === null) branch checks public — that's the anonymous path, not the inheritance fallback we're guarding.

tasks.title: Confirm owner/admin shortcuts unaffected
tasks.description: Lines 209, 543 — neither depends on the flag.

tasks.title: Four-state matrix unit tests on hasPermission
tasks.description: (anon, true) grant; (anon, false) grant (anon unaffected); (auth, true) grant; (auth, false) deny.

tasks.title: Verify owner/admin grants persist
tasks.description: Both work regardless of the flag.

tasks.title: Resolve inheritFromPublic in applyRbacFilters
tasks.description: Once at the top of MagicRbacHandler::applyRbacFilters via PermissionHandler::resolveInheritFromPublic($schema).

tasks.title: Plumb flag through processAuthorizationRule
tasks.description: → processConditionalRule, processSimpleRule. New parameter on each method.

tasks.title: Guard processConditionalRule public branch
tasks.description: When $group === 'public' AND inheritFromPublic === false AND $userId !== null, set $userQualifies = false.

tasks.title: Guard processSimpleRule public branch
tasks.description: When $rule === 'public' AND inheritFromPublic === false AND $userId !== null, return false.

tasks.title: Same updates in UNION-based path
tasks.description: buildRbacConditionsSql, processConditionalRuleSql.

tasks.description: Build query, inspect SQL or run against fixture DB.
